title: centaurea ilvensis
intro: Centaurea ilvensis, also known as Illyrian knapweed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent, due to its high content of polyphenols and terpenoids. Studies have shown that Centaurea ilvensis may have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antimicrobial properties. Centaurea ilvensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile addition to traditional medicine practices.
